title: Eval regression fixtures (observation only)
policy: Do NOT attempt to fix these in the query path. These are regression fixtures for eval re-runs — not open product limitations and not drivers for clean-file conversion (Phase 2 SHELVED 2026-07-19).
infra_note: Prior 'dense PDF unretrievable' / high miss rates were largely null file_search_document_name (response.documentName vs name; list pager .page vs .documents). On correctly indexed original IFZA PDF (2026-07-19): fresh-20 = 18/20; O1 PASS; Q11 PASS.

cases.question: What's the fee for a Company Employee List?
Cost to add 2 extra business activities beyond the free three?
cases.expect: 2 × 1,000 = 2,000 (setup Extra Business Activity only; no amendment)
cases.observed_on_md_2026_07_18: Correct 1,000×2 setup math AND also Change/Adding/Removing of Activity = 2,000 amendment line (scored FAIL soft-fail)
cases.observed_on_pdf_2026_07_19: PASS — both setup and amendment surfaced; numbers pass
cases.note: Not an open known limitation. Keep in eval set; do not cite as product soft-fail.

cases.question: Does Meydan require WPS?
cases.observed_on_pdf_2026_07_19: Hard refusal (g=0) — Meydan-doc issue, both corpora

cases.question: Compare establishment card costs between IFZA and Meydan.
cases.observed_on_md_2026_07_18: Meydan 2,020 OK; IFZA initial/renewal lines missed

cases.question: I want to add an individual shareholder to my IFZA company. What fee do I pay?
cases.expect: Both Additional Individual Shareholder ≈ 350 (setup) AND Change/Adding/Removing of Shareholder ≈ 2,000 (amendment), distinctly labeled
cases.observed_historically: Often amendment 2,000 only; setup 350 intermittently retrieved
cases.note: Not an open known limitation. Keep in eval set; do not re-architect query path.

cases.question: New IFZA company, 3-year Zero Visa license, plus establishment card — total upfront?
cases.expect: discounted 31,000 + est card 2,000 (md label: Zero Visa | 3-Year (20% off))
cases.observed_on_pdf_2026_07_19: FAIL — quoted standard 38,700 + 2,000; noted discounts may apply
cases.note: PDF text contains BOTH 38,700 and 31,000 on the same Zero Visa row. Not missing content — column/header disambiguation. Clean md uses explicit '3-Year (20% off)' label. See eval/FRESH20_PDF_VS_MD.md Q10 section.
